text.title: Blameless Retro Template (Human Facilitation) Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the report artefact. Validator script in `scripts/validate-blameless-retro-template.py` enforces it.

example.note: Facilitator is a responder; <3 participants + factors; person-as-subject factor; action item owner=team; meta-round empty; not published.

section.title: Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: contributing_factors entries that name individuals as the cause
action_items with target_date in the past at publish time OR >90 days out
meta_round_notes empty (the meta round is non-skippable per r4)
facilitator listed as also-a-direct-responder of the incident
action items prescribing individual training as the sole fix ('Bob will be more careful')
